title: helianthemum heterophyllum var. candidum
intro: Helianthemum heterophyllum var. candidum, also known as Rockrose or White Rockrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Rockrose is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it can be combined with other herbs to create a soothing and calming effect.
